task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the KStars/INDI telescope control panel or Ekos mount module showing the telescope status as 'Unparked' or tracking actively.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened or read the maintenance specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'pointing_calibration_spec.txt' open in a text editor or its contents displayed in a terminal.

task_completion.description: Verify 5-second LIGHT frame exposures are captured for the 8 reference stars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the KStars/Ekos capture module showing an exposure time of '5' seconds, frame type 'LIGHT', and a sequence running or completed for the target stars (Polaris, Capella, Regulus, Arcturus, Vega, Altair, Deneb, Fomalhaut).

task_completion.description: Verify images are saved to the correct star-specific directories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal output showing directories named after the stars (e.g., 'polaris', 'capella') inside '/home/ga/Images/pointing_model/' containing newly captured image files.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the TPoint-format pointing model input file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '/home/ga/Documents/pointing_model.dat' open in a text editor or displayed in the terminal, containing coordinate data for all 8 reference stars.

task_completion.description: Verify the final sky view is captured using the provided script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window showing the execution of '~/capture_sky_view.sh' or a file manager/image viewer displaying 'final_sky.png' in '~/Images/pointing_model/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture images rather than faking them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the KStars application, Ekos capture sequences, and INDI control panels, rather than terminal commands using 'touch' or 'cp' to create fake FITS files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not reuse stale FITS files from previous runs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the agent actively ran new capture sequences for the stars instead of just moving or renaming existing files in the directory.

integrity.description: Verify the pointing model file contains actual coordinates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for realistic coordinate data (Right Ascension/Declination or Alt/Az) in 'pointing_model.dat' rather than placeholder text, dummy values, or a direct copy-paste of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target stars: polaris, capella, regulus, arcturus, vega, altair, deneb, fomalhaut. Exposure time: 5 seconds. Base directory: /home/ga/Images/pointing_model. Pointing model file: /home/ga/Documents/pointing_model.dat. The task operates in a simulated KStars/INDI environment.
